body:
## Problem / Opportunity

Gene Hoglan (Death, Testament, Dark Angel, Strapping Young Lad, Dethklok) is one of the most technically revered death/thrash metal drummers. He's a **consistent GA4 organic top-10 profile** (drummer/3 across multiple session windows). Natural high-intent queries: "gene hoglan drum setup", "gene hoglan drums", "the atomic clock drummer" have no dedicated article page — only his profile at `/drummer/3`.

Same thesis as Matt Greiner (#1267) and Joey Jordison (#1380): a dedicated article creates a second ranking URL for his query cluster.

## New content: `/articles/gene-hoglan-drum-setup`

**File:** `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add new entry:

```js
'gene-hoglan-drum-setup': {
  title: "Gene Hoglan Drum Setup: The Atomic Clock's Complete Gear Breakdown",
  albumTitle: "Gene Hoglan",
  description: "Gene Hoglan's drum kit and gear setup. Pearl Reference drums, Zildjian cymbals, and the DW 9000 pedals behind Death, Testament, and Strapping Young Lad.",
  drummer: { name: 'Gene Hoglan', id: 3, slug: 'gene-hoglan' },
  relatedDrummers: [3, 4, 49],  // Gene, Dave Lombardo (Slayer/contemporaries), Richard Christy (Death successor)
  datePublished: '2026-06-18',
  dateModified: '2026-06-18',
  keywords: ['gene hoglan', 'gene hoglan drum setup', 'gene hoglan drums', 'atomic clock drummer', 'death drummer gear', 'testament drummer'],
  author: 'MetalForge Editorial',
}
```

## Content requirements (quality gate)
- **≥800 words** covering:
  1. Pearl Reference (or Pearl Reference Pure) kit — shell sizes, configurations
  2. Zildjian A Custom cymbal selection
  3. DW 9000 double pedal technique + settings
  4. Hoglan's signature "atomic clock" timing and how his gear supports it
  5. Era evolution: Dark Angel → Death (Human/Individual Thought Patterns) → Testament → SYL → Dethklok
- **FAQ section** (≥3 Q&As):
  - "What drum kit does Gene Hoglan use?"
  - "What cymbals does Gene Hoglan play?"
  - "Why is Gene Hoglan called The Atomic Clock?"
- **Internal links:** /drummer/3, at least 2 related profiles (/drummer/4 Dave Lombardo, /drummer/49 Richard Christy)
- Article JSON-LD via existing ALBUM_ARTICLES → SSR meta pipeline

## SSR meta target
- **Title:** `Gene Hoglan Drum Setup: The Atomic Clock Complete Gear Guide | MetalForge`
- **Description:** `Gene Hoglan's Pearl drums, Zildjian cymbals, and DW pedals — the rig behind Death, Testament, and SYL. Complete setup and technique breakdown.`

## GSC query bucket served
- "gene hoglan drum setup"
- "gene hoglan drums"
- "the atomic clock metal drummer"
- "death band drummer gear"

## Sequencing
Independent. Ships in parallel with #1380 (Joey) and #1384 (Tomas Haake) — different `albumArticles.js` entries, no conflict.

## Verify
1. `/articles/gene-hoglan-drum-setup` returns 200
2. SSR title contains "Gene Hoglan" + "Drum Setup"
3. Article JSON-LD + BreadcrumbList present
4. Word count ≥800
5. FAQ section present

## Done
- [ ] New entry in `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`
- [ ] Article content ≥800 words with FAQ + internal links
- [ ] SSR meta keyword-matched
- [ ] Internal links to /drummer/3 and ≥2 related profiles
title: SEO: Gene Hoglan drum setup article — 'The Atomic Clock' targets death/thrash metal queries
